title: caprifolium italicum var. album
intro: Caprifolium italicum var. album, also known as the white Italian honeysuckle or woodbine, is a flowering plant species within the family Caprifoliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Caprifolium italicum var. album include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its flowers, leaves, and stems can be used separately or in combination to harness its medicinal properties.
